headline: Command the Clone Wars’™ Most Cunning Operatives in Star Wars Zero Company™, Launching August 27
summary: REDWOOD CITY, Calif., June 06, 2026--Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA) today announced that Star Wars Zero Company™, a single-player turn-based tactics game, developed by Bit Reactor in collaboration with Lucasfilm Games, will be available on PC, PlayStation® 5 and Xbox Series X|S starting August 27, 2026. Pre-Orders are now available on all platforms.
